body.title: Standardize tags across palace nodes and file headers
body.result: Defined C-tag-vocabulary concept (palace.concepts.tag-vocabulary). Updated 14 palace.goals.* nodes and 5 palace.concepts.* nodes with tags. Made tags mandatory in /concept skill. Added # tags: to 12 top UU source files + cc_queue.py. Tags: Architecture, Cognition, Memory, Infrastructure, Workflow, Queue, SmallCompute, SelfImproving, MultiAgent, FactoryFactory, CompiledInference, Pipeline, Vision, Productivity, Platform.
body.description:
Establish a shared tag vocabulary that runs across the whole stack: palace.concepts.*, palace.goals.*, palace.decisions.*, and source file headers. Tags replace explicit cross-links — things that belong together share a tag; you discover related nodes by querying the tag rather than following maintained links. No links to break, no links to update when things move.

Tag format in palace node metadata: already has 'tags' array — standardize usage.
Tag format in file headers: add '# tags: <tag1>, <tag2>' as the last line of the module docstring.

Work:
1. Define the tag vocabulary (drawn from existing goal slugs G-xxx, concept slugs C-xxx, and topic tags like 'spreading-activation', 'cognition', 'memory', 'queue')
2. Update /concept skill (T-concept-skill) spec to make tags mandatory on every concept record
3. Add tags to existing palace.goals.* and palace.concepts.* nodes
4. Add # tags: lines to high-traffic source files (devices/igor/*, unseen_university/db_proxy.py, etc.)
5. Document the tag vocabulary in a palace.concepts.C-tag-vocabulary node

**Affected files:** ~/.claude/skills/concept/SKILL.md (tags required), adc.palace (goal/concept metadata), high-traffic .py files (header tags)
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Tag vocabulary + tooling. No link-removal from existing files — that's a separate cleanup pass once tags are established. File header tags: top 20 most-read files only, not whole codebase.
**Test plan:** no automated tests — validate by querying SELECT path FROM adc.palace WHERE 'spreading-activation' = ANY(metadata->'tags') and confirming related nodes cluster correctly
